description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a predominantly matte black finish. It features a prominent pistol grip and a detachable box magazine inserted in front of the trigger guard. The rifle has a short barrel and a squared receiver, with a vertical foregrip mounted under the front section for improved handling. Both sides of the receiver have integrated rails, likely for mounting accessories such as optics or lights, and simple iron sights are visible on the top. The overall design is utilitarian and tactical, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a pistol grip, detachable box magazine, and vertical foregrip, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile, vertical foregrip, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pistol grip, detachable box magazine, squared receiver, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, pistol grip, and the magazine protruding downward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and foregrip.
